description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with slatted sides and a slightly weathered appearance, suggesting it is designed for practical use in urban environments. The box features two recessed hand grips, one on each of the longer sides, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The corners are reinforced with dark metal brackets, adding both structural strength and a touch of industrial style. The wood planks vary slightly in color, with a lighter plank at the bottom, indicating either wear or intentional design. The interior is open and unobstructed, making it suitable for storing or transporting various items. The overall construction appears sturdy, with visible wood grain and a matte finish.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with metal-reinforced corners and recessed hand grips on the longer sides. The box has a weathered, practical look with visible wood grain and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed hand grip and metal corner brackets, with a clear view of the wood grain and lighter bottom plank.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the recessed hand grip and metal brackets, with the wood planks aligned horizontally and the interior visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, featuring the same recessed hand grip and metal corner brackets, with the lighter bottom plank visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the recessed hand grip and metal brackets, with the wood planks and interior clearly visible.
attribute_handle_design: recessed hand grips on longer sides
